description: S1B Odds-Extension: local OU/1X2/BTTS odds merged onto the international dataset finals subset. Local file only; NO external fetch. AH absent. Covered subset (WC2018+2022, n=128) -> FULL; all else stays 1X2_ONLY.

extension_columns.ou_market_available: bool (true iff all 10 ladder cells present)
extension_columns.ou_mu_derived: number|null (market mu interpolated from OU ladder)
extension_columns.odds_extension_covered: bool (true for WC2018/2022 with local OU)
extension_columns.w1_full_pipeline_validated: True only on covered subset rows

hard_rules: covered subset = WC2018+2022 finals, n=128; AH and 2014 NOT covered.
pipeline_mode=FULL and w1_full_pipeline_validated=True only on covered rows; never on qualifiers / 2014 / AH / 2026.
2026 (12 matches) is a current snapshot only; never in historical backtest.
merge reads local file only; NO fetch/scrape/API/purchase; local odds not committed.
backtest imports w1_score_engine read-only; does not modify engine / DEFAULT_RHO / thresholds / decision_policy.
